problem_context.expected_behavior: Given ownership of both sentinel link fields, assign node_next=head and node_prev=head and establish the shared empty circular doubly-linked-list predicate.
forbidden_patterns: No xizi_dll_empty duplicate predicate, no case-private active lib, no field-only postcondition, no QCP annotation in INPUT.
problem_context.input_output_contract: Require non-null head and ownership of both pointer fields with arbitrary old values; Ensure xizi_dll(head@pre,nil) from the shared common library.
preferred_hidden_properties: The shared recursive xizi_dll predicate at nil, folded from the two self-links.
problem_context.problem_statement: Reverify the doubly linked-list sentinel initializer after replacing the case-local Rocq library with the shared QCIPLib/xizi/xizi_double_link_common library. Final formal artifacts must have no active case-private xizi_double_link_init_lib dependency.
reference_case_hints: Follow predicate-first style of QCP_demos_LLM single-linked-list cases; only QCP_demos_LLM references are allowed.
spec_hint: Use xizi_dll and strategies from QCIPLib.xizi.xizi_double_link_common only. Treat the controller-created case_lib as compatibility seed only; do not define, import, or rely on case-specific predicates/helpers in the C or generated proofs.
